public class

PowerManager

extends ManagerBase
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.autolink.manager.ManagerBase
     ↳ com.autolink.manager.power.PowerManager

Class Overview

This is a sample manager class that extends ManagerBase

Constants
int BRIGHTNESS_MODE_AUTO 亮度模式为自动
int BRIGHTNESS_MODE_MANUAL 亮度模式为手动
int DISPLAYID_BUTTON 按键背光的屏幕ID
int DISPLAYID_CLUSTER 仪表的屏幕ID
int DISPLAYID_COPILOT 副驾屏的屏幕ID
int DISPLAYID_HVAC 空调屏的屏幕ID
int DISPLAYID_IVI 中控的屏幕ID
int DISPLAYID_MAX 用于限制屏幕的id最大值
int DISPLAYID_ROOF 吸顶屏的屏幕ID
int DISPLAY_OFF 屏幕状态为关闭
int DISPLAY_ON 屏幕状态为打开
int ERROR_CODE 错误标识
int MODULE_AVM 屏保设置的模块-AVM
int MODULE_COMMON 屏保设置的模块-COMMON
int MODULE_HVAC 屏保设置的模块-HVAC
int MODULE_PHONE 屏保设置的模块-PHONE
int MODULE_SYSTEM_UI 屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_UI
int MODULE_SYSTEM_WARNING 屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_WARNING
int MODULE_TOUCH 屏保设置的模块-TOUCH
int MODULE_VOCIE 屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_VOCIE
int POWER_OFF 电源状态 OFF
int POWER_ON 电源状态 ON
int PWR_MODE_ABNORMAL 异常模式
int PWR_MODE_CHARGGING 充电模式
int PWR_MODE_RUN 工作模式
int PWR_MODE_SLEEP 睡眠模式
int PWR_MODE_STANDBY 待机模式
int PWR_MODE_STR STR模式
int THEME_MODE_AUTO 主题模式为自动
int THEME_MODE_AUTO_CUSTOM 主题模式为自动(自定义时间)
int THEME_MODE_AUTO_SENSOR 主题模式为自动(跟随环境明暗)
int THEME_MODE_DAY 主题模式为白天
int THEME_MODE_NIGHT 主题模式为黑夜
int TIME_MODE_CUSTOM 设置时间的模式-自定义
int TIME_MODE_SUN 设置时间的模式-日出日落

Constants

public static final int BRIGHTNESS_MODE_AUTO

亮度模式为自动

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int BRIGHTNESS_MODE_MANUAL

亮度模式为手动

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int DISPLAYID_BUTTON

按键背光的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int DISPLAYID_CLUSTER

仪表的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int DISPLAYID_COPILOT

副驾屏的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int DISPLAYID_HVAC

空调屏的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int DISPLAYID_IVI

中控的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int DISPLAYID_MAX

用于限制屏幕的id最大值

Constant Value: 6 (0x00000006)

public static final int DISPLAYID_ROOF

吸顶屏的屏幕ID

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int DISPLAY_OFF

屏幕状态为关闭

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int DISPLAY_ON

屏幕状态为打开

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int ERROR_CODE

错误标识

Constant Value: -1 (0xffffffff)

public static final int MODULE_AVM

屏保设置的模块-AVM

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int MODULE_COMMON

屏保设置的模块-COMMON

Constant Value: 7 (0x00000007)

public static final int MODULE_HVAC

屏保设置的模块-HVAC

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int MODULE_PHONE

屏保设置的模块-PHONE

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int MODULE_SYSTEM_UI

屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_UI

Constant Value: 6 (0x00000006)

public static final int MODULE_SYSTEM_WARNING

屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_WARNING

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int MODULE_TOUCH

屏保设置的模块-TOUCH

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int MODULE_VOCIE

屏保设置的模块-SYSTEM_VOCIE

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int POWER_OFF

电源状态 OFF

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int POWER_ON

电源状态 ON

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int PWR_MODE_ABNORMAL

异常模式

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int PWR_MODE_CHARGGING

充电模式

Constant Value: 6 (0x00000006)

public static final int PWR_MODE_RUN

工作模式

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int PWR_MODE_SLEEP

睡眠模式

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int PWR_MODE_STANDBY

待机模式

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int PWR_MODE_STR

STR模式

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int THEME_MODE_AUTO

主题模式为自动

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int THEME_MODE_AUTO_CUSTOM

主题模式为自动(自定义时间)

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int THEME_MODE_AUTO_SENSOR

主题模式为自动(跟随环境明暗)

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int THEME_MODE_DAY

主题模式为白天

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int THEME_MODE_NIGHT

主题模式为黑夜

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int TIME_MODE_CUSTOM

设置时间的模式-自定义

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int TIME_MODE_SUN

设置时间的模式-日出日落

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

serviceName String

public void addDisplayInfoChangedListener (PowerManager.onDisplayInfoChangedListener listener)

添加屏幕Info接口

Parameters
listener PowerManager.onDisplayInfoChangedListener

public void addPowerChangedListener (PowerManager.PowerChangedListener listener)

添加回调监听 新增，用于替换之前接口

Parameters
listener PowerManager.PowerChangedListener

public void addPowerListener (PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener listener)

添加回调监听

Parameters
listener PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener

public int getBrightness (int displayId)

获取各种屏幕亮度的等级

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
Returns
int level 屏幕亮度等级

public int getBrightnessMode (int displayId)

获取屏幕的亮度模式

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
Returns
int mode 亮度模式 ERROR(/@BRIGHTNESS_MODE_AUTO), or ERROR(/@BRIGHTNESS_MODE_MANUAL)

public int[] getCustomThemeTime (int mode)

获取自定义时间

Parameters
mode int: ERROR(/@TIME_MODE_SUN), or ERROR(/@TIME_MODE_CUSTOM)
Returns
int[]

public float getDisplayInfoStatus (int displayId, String type)

Parameters
displayId int
type String
Returns
float

public int getDisplayPowerState (int displayId)

获取屏幕的亮灭屏状态

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
Returns
int status 屏幕的亮灭

public static int getIdByDisplayName (String name)

通过名称获取屏幕的ID

Parameters
name String
Returns
int

public static String getNameByDisplayId (int displayId)

获取屏幕的名称

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
Returns
String

public int getPowerMode ()

获取电源模式

Returns
int {POWER_MODE_TYPE}

public int getPowerStatus ()

获取电源状态

Returns
int {POWER_STATUS_TYPE}

public int getThemeMode (int displayId)

获取屏幕的主题

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
Returns
int theme mode 屏幕主题 ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_DAY), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_NIGHT), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_CUSTOM), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_SENSOR)

public void removeDisplayInfoChangedListener (PowerManager.onDisplayInfoChangedListener listener)

移除屏幕info接口

Parameters
listener PowerManager.onDisplayInfoChangedListener

public void removePowerChangedListener (PowerManager.PowerChangedListener listener)

移除对应的回调监听 ,用于替换之前的接口

Parameters
listener PowerManager.PowerChangedListener

public void removePowerListener (PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener listener)

移除对应的回调监听

Parameters
listener PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener

public void setBrightness (int displayId, int level)

设置各种屏幕的亮度

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
level int: 屏幕亮度的等级

public void setBrightnessMode (int displayId, int mode)

设置屏幕的亮度模式

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
mode int: 亮度模式 ERROR(/@BRIGHTNESS_MODE_AUTO), or ERROR(/@BRIGHTNESS_MODE_MANUAL)

public void setCustomThemeTime (int mode, int[] dayTime)

设置自定义时间 自定义

Parameters
mode int: ERROR(/@TIME_MODE_SUN), or ERROR(/@TIME_MODE_CUSTOM)

public void setDisplayInfoStatus (int displayId, String type, int var)

Parameters
displayId int
type String
var int

public void setDisplayPowerState (int displayId, int status, int action)

设置屏幕的亮灭

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
status int: 屏幕的状态(OFF:0 ON:1 EXIT:2)
action int: 屏幕的使能(ACC_OFF_ENABLE:0 ACC_ON_ENABLE:1 FORCE_ENABLE:2)

public boolean setScreensaverState (int id, boolean enter)

设置屏保状态

Parameters
id int: 模块ID(MODULE_PHONE/MODULE_AVM/MODULE_HVAC/MODULE_TOUCH/MODULE_SYSTEM_WARNING/MODULE_VOCIE)
enter boolean: 进入和退出屏保
Returns
boolean

public void setThemeMode (int mode)

设置屏幕的主题

Parameters
mode int: theme mode 屏幕主题 ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_DAY), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_NIGHT), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_CUSTOM), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_SENSOR)

public void setThemeMode (int displayId, int mode)

设置屏幕的主题

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_IVI), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_CLUSTER), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_COPILOT), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_HVAC), or ERROR(/@DISPLAYID_ROOF)
mode int: 屏幕的主题 ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_DAY), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_NIGHT), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_CUSTOM), or ERROR(/@THEME_MODE_AUTO_SENSOR)
